| public.processed_print_orders | processed_print_orders_ignored_idx | CREATE INDEX processed_print_orders_ignored_idx ON public.processed_print_orders USING btree (ignored, admin_status) |

| public.processed_print_orders | processed_print_orders_order_name_queued_idx | CREATE INDEX processed_print_orders_order_name_queued_idx ON public.processed_print_orders USING btree (order_name, queued_date_time DESC NULLS LAST, id DESC) WHERE (order_name IS NOT NULL) |
| public.processed_print_orders | processed_print_orders_order_name_trgm_idx | CREATE INDEX processed_print_orders_order_name_trgm_idx ON public.processed_print_orders USING gin (order_name gin_trgm_ops) WHERE (order_name IS NOT NULL) |
| public.processed_print_orders | processed_print_orders_order_type_queued_idx | CREATE INDEX processed_print_orders_order_type_queued_idx ON public.processed_print_orders USING btree (upper(COALESCE(order_type, 'S'::text)), queued_date_time DESC NULLS LAST, id DESC) |
| public.processed_print_orders | processed_print_orders_pkey | CREATE UNIQUE INDEX processed_print_orders_pkey ON public.processed_print_orders USING btree (id) |

| public.processed_print_orders | processed_print_orders_source_month_idx | CREATE INDEX processed_print_orders_source_month_idx ON public.processed_print_orders USING btree (source_month) |

| public.processed_print_orders | processed_print_orders_xml_file_name_trgm_idx | CREATE INDEX processed_print_orders_xml_file_name_trgm_idx ON public.processed_print_orders USING gin (xml_file_name gin_trgm_ops) WHERE (xml_file_name IS NOT NULL) |
| public.push_notification_state | push_notification_state_pkey | CREATE UNIQUE INDEX push_notification_state_pkey ON public.push_notification_state USING btree (event_key) |
| public.push_subscriptions | idx_push_subscriptions_active | CREATE INDEX idx_push_subscriptions_active ON public.push_subscriptions USING btree (is_active) |
| public.push_subscriptions | idx_push_subscriptions_last_seen | CREATE INDEX idx_push_subscriptions_last_seen ON public.push_subscriptions USING btree (last_seen_at DESC) |

| public.push_subscriptions | push_subscriptions_pkey | CREATE UNIQUE INDEX push_subscriptions_pkey ON public.push_subscriptions USING btree (id) |

## Views

| view_name | view_definition |
| --- | --- |
| public.v_print_log_daily |  SELECT source_date,<br>    printer_name,<br>    count(*) FILTER (WHERE is_printed) AS done_jobs,<br>    count(*) FILTER (WHERE is_aborted) AS aborted_jobs,<br>    count(*) FILTER (WHERE is_deleted) AS deleted_jobs,<br>    COALESCE(sum(printed_area), (0)::bigint) AS printed_area_m2,<br>    COALESCE(sum(media_length_used), (0)::bigint) AS media_length_m,<br>    COALESCE(sum(duration_sec), (0)::bigint) AS duration_sec<br>   FROM print_accounting_rows<br>  GROUP BY source_date, printer_name; |
| public.v_print_log_rows |  SELECT id,<br>    printer_name,<br>    source_date,<br>    row_type,<br>    job_id,<br>    job_name,<br>    result,<br>    is_printed,<br>    is_deleted,<br>    is_aborted,<br>    reception_at,<br>    start_at,<br>    ready_at,<br>        CASE<br>            WHEN ((start_at IS NOT NULL) AND (ready_at IS NOT NULL) AND (ready_at >= start_at) AND (EXTRACT(epoch FROM (ready_at - start_at)) <= (86400)::numeric)) THEN (EXTRACT(epoch FROM (ready_at - start_at)))::integer<br>            ELSE NULL::integer<br>        END AS duration_sec,<br>    media_type,<br>    media_length_used,<br>    printed_area,<br>    ((media_length_used)::numeric / 10000.0) AS media_length_m,<br>    ((printed_area)::numeric / 1000000.0) AS printed_area_m2<br>   FROM print_accounting_rows; |
| public.v_print_order_pipeline |  WITH reprint_summary AS (<br>         SELECT processed_order_reprint_requests.order_id,<br>            (count(*))::integer AS reprint_request_count,<br>            (count(*) FILTER (WHERE (processed_order_reprint_requests.status = 'pending'::text)))::integer AS reprint_pending_count,<br>            (count(*) FILTER (WHERE (processed_order_reprint_requests.status = ANY (ARRAY['completed'::text, 'resolved'::text, 'done'::text]))))::integer AS reprint_completed_count,<br>            (array_agg(processed_order_reprint_requests.status ORDER BY processed_order_reprint_requests.requested_at DESC, processed_order_reprint_requests.id DESC))[1] AS latest_reprint_status<br>           FROM processed_order_reprint_requests<br>          GROUP BY processed_order_reprint_requests.order_id<br>        ), processed_normal AS (<br>         SELECT p.id,<br>            p.order_key,<br>            p.order_name,<br>            p.xml_file_name,<br>            p.guid,<br>            p.status,<br>            p.order_date_time,<br>            p.queued_date_time,<br>            p.printer_name,<br>            p.run_workflow,<br>            p.workflow_name,<br>            p.order_type,<br>            p.print_files,<br>            p.source_xml_path,<br>            p.source_xml_hash,<br>            p.source_month,<br>            p.imported_at,<br>            p.updated_at,<br>            p.order_dedupe_key,<br>            p.ignored,<br>            p.ignore_reason<br>           FROM processed_print_orders p<br>          WHERE ((upper(COALESCE(p.order_type, 'S'::text)) <> 'R'::text) AND (COALESCE(p.ignored, false) = false))<br>        ), processed_reprints AS (<br>         SELECT DISTINCT ON (COALESCE(NULLIF(p.source_xml_path, ''::text), NULLIF(p.xml_file_name, ''::text), (p.id)::text)) p.id,<br>            p.order_key,<br>            p.order_name,<br>            p.xml_file_name,<br>            p.guid,<br>            p.status,<br>            p.order_date_time,<br>            p.queued_date_time,<br>            p.printer_name,<br>            p.run_workflow,<br>            p.workflow_name,<br>            p.order_type,<br>            p.print_files,<br>            p.source_xml_path,<br>            p.source_xml_hash,<br>            p.source_month,<br>            p.imported_at,<br>            p.updated_at,<br>            p.order_dedupe_key,<br>            p.ignored,<br>            p.ignore_reason,<br>            COALESCE(NULLIF(regexp_replace(regexp_replace(lower(COALESCE(p.order_name, ''::text)), '([[:space:]_-]*reprint.*)$'::text, ''::text, 'i'::text), '[[:space:]_-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text), NULLIF(regexp_replace(regexp_replace(lower(COALESCE(p.xml_file_name, ''::text)), '([[:space:]_-]*reprint.*\|\.xml)$'::text, ''::text, 'i'::text), '[[:space:]_-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text)) AS parent_match_key<br>           FROM processed_print_orders p<br>          WHERE ((upper(COALESCE(p.order_type, 'S'::text)) = 'R'::text) AND (COALESCE(p.ignored, false) = false))<br>          ORDER BY COALESCE(NULLIF(p.source_xml_path, ''::text), NULLIF(p.xml_file_name, ''::text), (p.id)::text), p.queued_date_time DESC NULLS LAST, p.updated_at DESC, p.id DESC<br>        ), incoming_pipeline AS (<br>         SELECT i.order_number,<br>            i.external_order_id,<br>            i.customer_order_id,<br>            i.received_at,<br>            i.api_seen_at,<br>            p.id AS processed_order_id,<br>            p.order_name AS processed_order_name,<br>            p.xml_file_name,<br>            p.queued_date_time AS processed_at,<br>            p.queued_date_time,<br>            p.workflow_name,<br>            p.order_type,<br>            p.print_files,<br>            p.source_xml_path,<br>            p.source_month<br>           FROM (print_orders_received i<br>             LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT p_1.id,<br>                    p_1.order_key,<br>                    p_1.order_name,<br>                    p_1.xml_file_name,<br>                    p_1.guid,<br>                    p_1.status,<br>                    p_1.order_date_time,<br>                    p_1.queued_date_time,<br>                    p_1.printer_name,<br>                    p_1.run_workflow,<br>                    p_1.workflow_name,<br>                    p_1.order_type,<br>                    p_1.print_files,<br>                    p_1.source_xml_path,<br>                    p_1.source_xml_hash,<br>                    p_1.source_month,<br>                    p_1.imported_at,<br>                    p_1.updated_at,<br>                    p_1.order_dedupe_key,<br>                    p_1.ignored,<br>                    p_1.ignore_reason<br>                   FROM processed_normal p_1<br>                  WHERE (p_1.order_name = ANY (array_remove(ARRAY[i.order_number, i.external_order_id, i.customer_order_id], NULL::text)))<br>                  ORDER BY<br>                        CASE<br>                            WHEN (p_1.order_name = i.order_number) THEN 1<br>                            WHEN (p_1.order_name = i.external_order_id) THEN 2<br>                            WHEN (p_1.order_name = i.customer_order_id) THEN 3<br>                            ELSE 4<br>                        END, p_1.queued_date_time DESC NULLS LAST, p_1.id DESC<br>                 LIMIT 1) p ON (true))<br>        ), processed_orphans AS (<br>         SELECT p.order_name AS order_number,<br>            NULL::text AS external_order_id,<br>            NULL::text AS customer_order_id,<br>            NULL::timestamp with time zone AS received_at,<br>            NULL::timestamp with time zone AS api_seen_at,<br>            p.id AS processed_order_id,<br>            p.order_name AS processed_order_name,<br>            p.xml_file_name,<br>            p.queued_date_time AS processed_at,<br>            p.queued_date_time,<br>            p.workflow_name,<br>            p.order_type,<br>            p.print_files,<br>            p.source_xml_path,<br>            p.source_month<br>           FROM processed_normal p<br>          WHERE (NOT (EXISTS ( SELECT 1<br>                   FROM print_orders_received i<br>                  WHERE (p.order_name = ANY (array_remove(ARRAY[i.order_number, i.external_order_id, i.customer_order_id], NULL::text))))))<br>        ), pipeline_rows AS (<br>         SELECT incoming_pipeline.order_number,<br>            incoming_pipeline.external_order_id,<br>            incoming_pipeline.customer_order_id,<br>            incoming_pipeline.received_at,<br>            incoming_pipeline.api_seen_at,<br>            incoming_pipeline.processed_order_id,<br>            incoming_pipeline.processed_order_name,<br>            incoming_pipeline.xml_file_name,<br>            incoming_pipeline.processed_at,<br>            incoming_pipeline.queued_date_time,<br>            incoming_pipeline.workflow_name,<br>            incoming_pipeline.order_type,<br>            incoming_pipeline.print_files,<br>            incoming_pipeline.source_xml_path,<br>            incoming_pipeline.source_month<br>           FROM incoming_pipeline<br>        UNION ALL<br>         SELECT processed_orphans.order_number,<br>            processed_orphans.external_order_id,<br>            processed_orphans.customer_order_id,<br>            processed_orphans.received_at,<br>            processed_orphans.api_seen_at,<br>            processed_orphans.processed_order_id,<br>            processed_orphans.processed_order_name,<br>            processed_orphans.xml_file_name,<br>            processed_orphans.processed_at,<br>            processed_orphans.queued_date_time,<br>            processed_orphans.workflow_name,<br>            processed_orphans.order_type,<br>            processed_orphans.print_files,<br>            processed_orphans.source_xml_path,<br>            processed_orphans.source_month<br>           FROM processed_orphans<br>        ), pipeline_with_reprints AS (<br>         SELECT pr_1.order_number,<br>            pr_1.external_order_id,<br>            pr_1.customer_order_id,<br>            pr_1.received_at,<br>            pr_1.api_seen_at,<br>            pr_1.processed_order_id,<br>            pr_1.processed_order_name,<br>            pr_1.xml_file_name,<br>            pr_1.processed_at,<br>            pr_1.queued_date_time,<br>            pr_1.workflow_name,<br>            pr_1.order_type,<br>            pr_1.print_files,<br>            pr_1.source_xml_path,<br>            pr_1.source_month,<br>            COALESCE(rr.reprint_record_count, 0) AS reprint_record_count,<br>            COALESCE(rr.reprint_records, '[]'::jsonb) AS reprint_records,<br>            rr.latest_reprint_record_at<br>           FROM (pipeline_rows pr_1<br>             LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT (count(*))::integer AS reprint_record_count,<br>                    max(rp.queued_date_time) AS latest_reprint_record_at,<br>                    jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('id', rp.id, 'orderName', rp.order_name, 'xmlFileName', rp.xml_file_name, 'status', rp.status, 'orderType', 'R', 'processedAt', rp.queued_date_time, 'queuedDateTime', rp.queued_date_time, 'sourceXmlPath', rp.source_xml_path, 'printFiles', rp.print_files, 'isFullReprint', (jsonb_array_length(COALESCE(rp.print_files, '[]'::jsonb)) > 1)) ORDER BY rp.queued_date_time DESC NULLS LAST, rp.id DESC) AS reprint_records<br>                   FROM processed_reprints rp<br>                  WHERE ((rp.parent_match_key = ANY (array_remove(ARRAY[regexp_replace(lower(COALESCE(pr_1.order_number, ''::text)), '[[:space:]_-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), regexp_replace(lower(COALESCE(pr_1.processed_order_name, ''::text)), '[[:space:]_-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), regexp_replace(lower(COALESCE(pr_1.external_order_id, ''::text)), '[[:space:]_-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), regexp_replace(lower(COALESCE(pr_1.customer_order_id, ''::text)), '[[:space:]_-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text)], ''::text))) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1<br>                           FROM (jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(pr_1.print_files, '[]'::jsonb)) parent_file(value)<br>                             JOIN jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(rp.print_files, '[]'::jsonb)) reprint_file(value) ON (((lower(COALESCE((parent_file.value ->> 'printFilePath'::text), ''::text)) = lower(COALESCE((reprint_file.value ->> 'printFilePath'::text), ''::text))) OR (regexp_replace(lower(regexp_replace(COALESCE((parent_file.value ->> 'printFilePath'::text), ''::text), '^.*[\\/]'::text, ''::text)), '[[:space:]_-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text) = regexp_replace(lower(regexp_replace(COALESCE((reprint_file.value ->> 'printFilePath'::text), ''::text), '^.*[\\/]'::text, ''::text)), '[[:space:]_-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text)))))<br>                          WHERE (COALESCE((parent_file.value ->> 'printFilePath'::text), ''::text) <> ''::text))))) rr ON (true))<br>        )<br> SELECT COALESCE(pr.order_number, pr.processed_order_name) AS order_number,<br>    pr.external_order_id,<br>    pr.customer_order_id,<br>    pr.received_at,<br>    pr.api_seen_at,<br>    pr.processed_order_id,<br>    pr.processed_order_name,<br>    pr.xml_file_name,<br>    pr.processed_at,<br>    pr.queued_date_time,<br>    pr.workflow_name,<br>    pr.order_type,<br>    pr.print_files,<br>    pr.source_xml_path,<br>    pr.source_month,<br>    pr.reprint_record_count,<br>    pr.reprint_records,<br>    pr.latest_reprint_record_at,<br>    COALESCE(r.reprint_request_count, 0) AS reprint_request_count,<br>    COALESCE(r.reprint_pending_count, 0) AS reprint_pending_count,<br>    COALESCE(r.reprint_completed_count, 0) AS reprint_completed_count,<br>    r.latest_reprint_status,<br>    (COALESCE(r.reprint_pending_count, 0) > 0) AS reprint_pending,<br>    false AS is_reprint_record,<br>        CASE<br>            WHEN (COALESCE(r.reprint_pending_count, 0) > 0) THEN 'reprint_pending'::text<br>            WHEN ((pr.external_order_id IS NOT NULL) AND (pr.processed_order_id IS NOT NULL)) THEN 'processed'::text<br>            WHEN ((pr.external_order_id IS NOT NULL) AND (pr.processed_order_id IS NULL)) THEN 'received_only'::text<br>            WHEN ((pr.external_order_id IS NULL) AND (pr.processed_order_id IS NOT NULL)) THEN 'processed_without_received'::text<br>            ELSE 'received_only'::text<br>        END AS pipeline_status<br>   FROM (pipeline_with_reprints pr<br>     LEFT JOIN reprint_summary r ON ((r.order_id = pr.processed_order_id))); |
| public.v_reporting_eod_printing_time |  SELECT COALESCE((ready_at)::date, source_date) AS report_date,<br>    printer_name AS printer,<br>    COALESCE(NULLIF(media_type, ''::text), 'Unknown media'::text) AS media_type,<br>    (count(*) FILTER (WHERE (lower(COALESCE(result, ''::text)) = 'done'::text)))::integer AS done_jobs,<br>    COALESCE(sum(active_time_sec) FILTER (WHERE (lower(COALESCE(result, ''::text)) = 'done'::text)), (0)::bigint) AS total_nett_printing_time_sec,<br>    COALESCE(sum(duration_sec) FILTER (WHERE (lower(COALESCE(result, ''::text)) = 'done'::text)), (0)::bigint) AS gross_elapsed_time_sec,<br>    COALESCE(sum(((printed_area)::numeric / 1000000.0)) FILTER (WHERE (lower(COALESCE(result, ''::text)) = 'done'::text)), (0)::numeric) AS consumed_media_m2,<br>    COALESCE(sum(((((((COALESCE(ink_cyan, 0) + COALESCE(ink_magenta, 0)) + COALESCE(ink_yellow, 0)) + COALESCE(ink_black, 0)) + COALESCE(ink_white, 0)))::numeric / 1000000.0)) FILTER (WHERE (lower(COALESCE(result, ''::text)) = 'done'::text)), (0)::numeric) AS consumed_ink_l<br>   FROM print_accounting_rows<br>  WHERE ((row_type IS NULL) OR (lower(row_type) = 'print'::text))<br>  GROUP BY COALESCE((ready_at)::date, source_date), printer_name, COALESCE(NULLIF(media_type, ''::text), 'Unknown media'::text); |
| public.v_reporting_eod_summary |  SELECT report_date,<br>    (sum(done_jobs))::integer AS done_jobs,<br>    (sum(total_nett_printing_time_sec))::bigint AS total_nett_printing_time_sec,<br>    (sum(total_nett_printing_time_sec) / 60.0) AS total_nett_printing_time_minutes,<br>    (sum(total_nett_printing_time_sec) / 3600.0) AS total_nett_printing_time_hours,<br>    (sum(gross_elapsed_time_sec) / 3600.0) AS gross_elapsed_time_hours,<br>    sum(consumed_media_m2) AS consumed_media_m2,<br>    sum(consumed_ink_l) AS consumed_ink_l<br>   FROM v_reporting_eod_printing_time<br>  GROUP BY report_date; |
| public.v_reporting_monthly_consumption |  SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month'::text, (COALESCE((ready_at)::date, source_date))::timestamp without time zone), 'YYYY-MM'::text) AS month,<br>    printer_name AS printer,<br>    COALESCE(NULLIF(media_type, ''::text), 'Unknown media'::text) AS media_type,<br>    (count(*) FILTER (WHERE (lower(COALESCE(result, ''::text)) = 'done'::text)))::integer AS done_jobs,<br>    COALESCE(sum(((printed_area)::numeric / 1000000.0)) FILTER (WHERE (lower(COALESCE(result, ''::text)) = 'done'::text)), (0)::numeric) AS total_consumed_media_m2_including_reprints,<br>    COALESCE(sum(((media_length_used)::numeric / 10000.0)) FILTER (WHERE (lower(COALESCE(result, ''::text)) = 'done'::text)), (0)::numeric) AS total_consumed_media_length_m,<br>    COALESCE(sum(((((((COALESCE(ink_cyan, 0) + COALESCE(ink_magenta, 0)) + COALESCE(ink_yellow, 0)) + COALESCE(ink_black, 0)) + COALESCE(ink_white, 0)))::numeric / 1000000.0)) FILTER (WHERE (lower(COALESCE(result, ''::text)) = 'done'::text)), (0)::numeric) AS total_consumed_ink_l_including_reprints,<br>    COALESCE(sum(active_time_sec) FILTER (WHERE (lower(COALESCE(result, ''::text)) = 'done'::text)), (0)::bigint) AS nett_printing_time_sec<br>   FROM print_accounting_rows<br>  WHERE ((row_type IS NULL) OR (lower(row_type) = 'print'::text))<br>  GROUP BY (to_char(date_trunc('month'::text, (COALESCE((ready_at)::date, source_date))::timestamp without time zone), 'YYYY-MM'::text)), printer_name, COALESCE(NULLIF(media_type, ''::text), 'Unknown media'::text); |
| public.v_reporting_monthly_files_per_order |  WITH file_counts AS (<br>         SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month'::text, (COALESCE(processed_print_orders.queued_date_time, processed_print_orders.imported_at) AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Prague'::text)), 'YYYY-MM'::text) AS month,<br>            (count(*))::integer AS total_xml_count,<br>            (COALESCE(sum(jsonb_array_length(COALESCE(processed_print_orders.print_files, '[]'::jsonb))), (0)::bigint))::integer AS total_files,<br>            (COALESCE(sum(jsonb_array_length(COALESCE(processed_print_orders.print_files, '[]'::jsonb))) FILTER (WHERE (upper(COALESCE(processed_print_orders.order_type, 'S'::text)) <> 'R'::text)), (0)::bigint))::integer AS standard_files,<br>            (COALESCE(sum(jsonb_array_length(COALESCE(processed_print_orders.print_files, '[]'::jsonb))) FILTER (WHERE (upper(COALESCE(processed_print_orders.order_type, 'S'::text)) = 'R'::text)), (0)::bigint))::integer AS reprint_files<br>           FROM processed_print_orders<br>          WHERE (COALESCE(processed_print_orders.ignored, false) = false)<br>          GROUP BY (to_char(date_trunc('month'::text, (COALESCE(processed_print_orders.queued_date_time, processed_print_orders.imported_at) AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Prague'::text)), 'YYYY-MM'::text))<br>        ), sales_orders AS (<br>         SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month'::text, (COALESCE(print_orders_received.received_at, print_orders_received.api_seen_at) AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Prague'::text)), 'YYYY-MM'::text) AS month,<br>            (count(DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(print_orders_received.order_number, ''::text), NULLIF(print_orders_received.external_order_id, ''::text), NULLIF(print_orders_received.customer_order_id, ''::text))))::integer AS total_sales_orders<br>           FROM print_orders_received<br>          WHERE (COALESCE(print_orders_received.ignored, false) = false)<br>          GROUP BY (to_char(date_trunc('month'::text, (COALESCE(print_orders_received.received_at, print_orders_received.api_seen_at) AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Prague'::text)), 'YYYY-MM'::text))<br>        )<br> SELECT COALESCE(f.month, s.month) AS month,<br>    COALESCE(f.total_xml_count, 0) AS total_xml_count,<br>    COALESCE(f.total_files, 0) AS total_files,<br>    COALESCE(f.standard_files, 0) AS standard_files,<br>    COALESCE(f.reprint_files, 0) AS reprint_files,<br>    COALESCE(s.total_sales_orders, 0) AS total_sales_orders,<br>    ((COALESCE(f.total_files, 0))::numeric / (NULLIF(s.total_sales_orders, 0))::numeric) AS avg_files_per_sales_order,<br>    ((COALESCE(f.total_files, 0))::numeric / (NULLIF(f.total_xml_count, 0))::numeric) AS avg_files_per_xml<br>   FROM (file_counts f<br>     FULL JOIN sales_orders s ON ((s.month = f.month))); |
| public.v_reporting_monthly_reprints |  SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month'::text, (COALESCE(queued_date_time, imported_at) AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Prague'::text)), 'YYYY-MM'::text) AS month,<br>    (COALESCE(sum(jsonb_array_length(COALESCE(print_files, '[]'::jsonb))) FILTER (WHERE (upper(COALESCE(order_type, 'S'::text)) <> 'R'::text)), (0)::bigint))::integer AS standard_file_count,<br>    (COALESCE(sum(jsonb_array_length(COALESCE(print_files, '[]'::jsonb))) FILTER (WHERE (upper(COALESCE(order_type, 'S'::text)) = 'R'::text)), (0)::bigint))::integer AS reprinted_file_count,<br>    ((COALESCE(sum(jsonb_array_length(COALESCE(print_files, '[]'::jsonb))) FILTER (WHERE (upper(COALESCE(order_type, 'S'::text)) = 'R'::text)), (0)::bigint))::numeric / (NULLIF(COALESCE(sum(jsonb_array_length(COALESCE(print_files, '[]'::jsonb))) FILTER (WHERE (upper(COALESCE(order_type, 'S'::text)) <> 'R'::text)), (0)::bigint), 0))::numeric) AS reprinted_files_per_standard_file<br>   FROM processed_print_orders<br>  WHERE (COALESCE(ignored, false) = false)<br>  GROUP BY (to_char(date_trunc('month'::text, (COALESCE(queued_date_time, imported_at) AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Prague'::text)), 'YYYY-MM'::text)); |
| public.v_reporting_monthly_stock_snapshot |  SELECT to_char((snapshot_month)::timestamp with time zone, 'YYYY-MM'::text) AS month,<br>    article_number,<br>    item_name,<br>    category,<br>    stock_type,<br>    unit,<br>    on_hand,<br>    media_stock_m2 AS media_stock_m2_end_of_month,<br>    ink_stock_l AS ink_stock_l_end_of_month,<br>    media_type,<br>    printer,<br>    snapshot_at,<br>    source<br>   FROM reporting_stock_monthly_snapshots; |
